story_body1: Nestled within the exclusive gated community of Dominion Beach on Marbella's prestigious New Golden Mile, this beautifully appointed home offers a rare combination of direct beach access, resort-style amenities, and the serene privacy of one of the Costa del Sol's most sought-after addresses.
story_body2: Steps from the beach, immersed in the exclusive Dominion Beach community. Spend your mornings by the pool or strolling to the shore, and dine beneath the stars at the resort's beachfront restaurant. This is not just a holiday rental — it is a lifestyle experience.
story_bullet3: Sleeps up to 6 guests in comfort
story_bullet4: Premium finishes and full equipment throughout
story_bullet5: Private terrace with garden and outdoor dining
quote_text: Step outside, and the Mediterranean stretches endlessly before you — the beach at your doorstep, golden Andalucían light all around.
contact_location:
Dominion Beach, New Golden Mile
Estepona, Málaga, Spain
story_heading: Where the Mediterranean becomes your backyard
hero_subtitle: An exclusive retreat on the shores of the Costa del Sol
hero_badge: Dominion Beach · New Golden Mile · Marbella
